id.description: The unique identifier of the Azure AD user.

mail_nickname.description: The mail alias or nickname for the Azure AD user.

object_id.description: The unique object ID of the Azure AD user.

onpremises_distinguished_name.description: The distinguished name of the user in an on-premises directory.

onpremises_domain_name.description: The domain name of the user in an on-premises directory.

onpremises_immutable_id.description: The immutable ID of the user for synchronization with an on-premises directory.

onpremises_sam_account_name.description: The SAM account name of the user in an on-premises directory.

onpremises_security_identifier.description: The security identifier (SID) of the user in an on-premises directory.

onpremises_user_principal_name.description: The user principal name (UPN) of the user in an on-premises directory.
